name: Rhubarb-Berry Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh or frozen rhubarb, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the rhubarb for 7 to 10 minutes.
2. Drain and place in a food processor.
3. Add the frozen berries on top of the rhubarb and puree.
4. Stir in lemon juice, ginger, and Chambord.
5. Pour the mixture into a 1-quart metal mold.
6. Freeze until set.
